Metadata.homeDescription: A bounded, private foresight experience—compliant, confidential, reviewable.

Home.heroLead: Decision fatigue and endless feeds rarely fix what hurts—you need one bounded session that aligns you with a plausible you. Shì Wèi, within strict ethics and time limits, lets you preview only your trajectory fragments—then bring that clarity back to the present.
Home.priceTag: Single session · Private facilitation · Compliance log · View plans
Home.caption: Observation field · you only
Home.v1p: Turn “if I keep going like this” into describable, reviewable imagery—less rumination, more agency.
Home.v2p: Only your path, only ten years, observe-don’t-intervene—rules that keep the experience psychologically and ethically sound.
Home.v3p: Structured summaries and path templates you can carry, execute, and audit (see Plans).
Home.problemBody: You simulate futures in your head but lack a reference line that belongs only to you. Comparing yourself to others’ highlight reels amplifies anxiety; generic advice doesn’t bear your consequences. You need a bounded, reviewable focal session—not prophecy, but compressing fog into actionable clarity.
Home.solutionBody: Within our compliance frame, you receive controlled “observation” of imagery and structure tied to your decisions—never other people’s spoilers. Leave with a summary and templates your team—or you—can run with.
Home.exploreLead: Same layout and components for every locale—the entries below are the full topical pages.
Home.teaserProcessP: Four steps, compliance rigor, observation room design, and the “now → +10y” narrative axis.
Home.teaserRulesP: Why not others, why ten years—constraints as safety and effectiveness.
Home.teaserTestimonialsP: Anonymous testimonials and synthetic case visuals.
Home.teaserPricingP: Three tiers, comparison, billing FAQs, archive UI cues.
Home.teaserTeamP: Bios, research lineage, and our duty of care for “seeing.”
Home.teaserFaqP: Validation, scheduling, refunds, data, minors—skimmable Q&A.
Home.footnote: Need a statement of work or enterprise procurement? See <services>Services</services> or <contact>Contact</contact>. Concept site; real offerings subject to contract and regulation.
Home.stickyHint: Compliance queue · reply within one business day
Home.timelineTitle: Timeline: from now to year ten
Home.timelineHint: Drag the handle to feel how far ahead you’re looking.

Booking.title: Concierge booking
Booking.conciergeStep1: What’s draining you most right now?
Booking.questionLabel: Session focus, city, timing constraints, anything else we should know
Booking.ethicsBody: Shì Wèi observes only your trajectory, never third parties, within a strict ten-year horizon and an observe-don’t-intervene frame. This is a bounded foresight practice—not prophecy, not guaranteed outcomes, and not a substitute for professional medical, legal, or financial advice where those apply.
Booking.ethicsCheckbox: I acknowledge and accept the ten-year ethical boundary and the observe-don’t-intervene rule for this service.
Booking.ethicsRequired: Please confirm the ethical boundary to continue.
Booking.submitFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
Booking.successKeyLine: Cryptographic reference generated — an advisor will contact you within 24 hours.
Booking.successDetail: Check your secure channel for confirmation. If the database is configured, your request is already in the compliance queue.

Simulation.title: Simulation
Simulation.lead: A scroll-driven preview of the observation arc: calibration, immersion, and synthesis. The interface on the left responds as you move through each phase.
Simulation.step0Body: Baseline intake and compliance framing: horizon lock, consent, and sensory priming so the field stabilizes around your trajectory only.
Simulation.step1Body: Controlled observation: structured prompts and environmental containment so imagery and structure emerge without narrative drift or third-party bleed.
Simulation.step2Body: Compression into reviewable outputs—summaries, path templates, and audit cues you can carry back into decisions and delegation.

Deliverables.title: Tangible artifacts
Deliverables.lead: Encrypted digital dossiers, physical archives, and anonymized dashboards—each designed to be reviewed, audited, and held to the same standard as institutional research.
Deliverables.dossierP: Dark-mode tablet or laptop mockup with trajectory blueprint, timelines, and biometric-style telemetry—blurred at the edges to signal privacy.
Deliverables.portfolioP: Matte-black soft-touch folio with wax seal / clasp on marble—an archival object for boards and family offices.
Deliverables.dashboardP: Client dashboard UX with names blurred—shows how synthesis reports, threads, and audit trails surface after the session.

Inner.processLead: From compliance intake through the observation session and debrief—four steps in one accountable arc.
Inner.rulesLead: Ten-year cap, no third-party viewing, observe-don’t-intervene.
Inner.termsLead: How Shì Wèi services are offered and what you can expect. Your signed agreement and applicable law prevail—have counsel review before production use.
Inner.privacyLead: How we collect, use, and protect personal information for bookings and sessions. Confidentiality is part of the product design.

About.title: About Shì Wèi
About.lead: Mission, method, and the lines we will not cross—so you know exactly what this experience is and is not.

Services.title: Services
Services.lead: Deliverables, compliance checkpoints in the workflow, and how teams procure executive sessions and archives.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.lead: Partnerships, press, and personal session requests—we aim to respond within one business day.

Portal.title: Client portal
Portal.lead: After sign-in: encrypted observation logs, booking status, and deliverables. This is a concept shell—no IdP wired yet. The route is ready for Supabase Auth or enterprise SSO.
